subcodes.title: Words to Ida Finch and Fanny and Alma Knobloch, spoken on 1908-11-11
subcodes.first_line: In the world of existence one must look in everything to the capacity and ability.... In the work of the Kingdom of God one should not consider capacity or ability
subcodes.subjects: @differences in human capacity, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @The Holy Spirit, @disregarding individual capacity; weakness, @apostles; early disciples of Christ, @Moses
